case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS TORRES,MANUEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $777.26 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES,MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
